text.message: Red don't plough me on the 83, will give you a free nb
He could have, was a good spot
Nah Green to strong after mono
Nb when someone has two early cities a little sus though
Already have both wood and brick
Yeah that spite block was oof
Bad move when green has a real shot to win
Not really Green has Road and Open settle
It’s a 50/50 from my perspective green
But from yours its tough to not hit red
Has given red so many pops
